cards.subject: ap-precalculus
cards.prompt: Two functions $F$ and $G$ are inverses of each other if this is true about their domains and ranges
cards.answer: the domain of F is the range of G and vice versa

cards.prompt: When a semi-log plot of data produces a straight line, the underlying function is most likely this type

cards.subject: ap-precalculus
cards.prompt: A horizontal translation of an exponential function $f(x) = ab^x$ to the left by $k$ units is equivalent to this
cards.answer: vertical dilation by a factor of b^k

cards.subject: ap-precalculus
cards.prompt: $\log_b(1)$ always equals this value, regardless of the base $b$
